title: Alchemical Emblems — Gallery 7
description: 40 Rosicrucian and hermetic emblems. The Chymical Wedding of Christian Rosenkreutz, Fludd's Summum bonum, Maier's Themis aurea, emblems of the Rosy Cross, the temple of the Rose Cross, and alchemical illustrations from the Secret Symbols of the Rosicrucians tradition.
notes: Rosicrucian emblem tradition — the Chymical Wedding is the key allegorical text.
